summary: Frontend-only verification for KN8 ERP Sub-fase 1.13 follow-up: Product master form (Lebar + UOM editor + EDIT mode) and POS cart kg/catch-weight. ALL 5 scenarios PASS — no data was created or submitted (no Save, no Submit Order).

verifications_performed.1_login: admin@kainnusantara.id / demo12345 prefilled — login-submit-button worked, landed on admin dashboard

3_uom_editor_add_remove.click_+_konversi_1x: row 0 appeared with from/to/factor/remove inputs (testids admin-product-conv-from-0, -to-0, -factor-0, -remove-0)
3_uom_editor_add_remove.click_remove-0: after removal: row 1 gone, row 0 still exists (collection length=1) — index re-keyed correctly

4_edit_batik_mega.form_populated: gramasi=200, lebar=1.5, uom_conversion row 0 = roll -> meter x 50 — EXACT MATCH to seed
4_edit_batik_mega.batal_edit_reset: after click: cancel button removed, gramasi reset to 0 — form cleared correctly

critical_code_review_comments: AdminView.jsx is 336 lines — within limits but approaching the soft cap; future split per-tab is advisable.
uom.js convFactor catch-weight branch only handles u==='kg' && base==='meter'; other bases (yard/cm) will not derive kg. OK per spec (products are meter-based) but worth noting.

CartPanel.jsx unit price scaling rounds to 2 decimals (Rp 616.667/kg shown with thousand separator dot from id-ID locale — actual computed 616666.67 → rounded). Functional but ensure tax/total uses unrounded computation server-side. Backend already verified per request brief.
seed_data_creation: NONE — explicitly avoided per request (no product create, no SO submit)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sub-fase 1.13 frontend fully verified. Product EDIT mode loads existing record into form (including uom_conversions array). POS catch-weight kg unit works: unitOptions() adds 'kg' when product.gramasi>0 && product.lebar>0; convFactor() returns 1/(gramasi*lebar/1000) for kg→meter. Combobox is used since 6 options >= SEARCH_THRESHOLD. To click options use testid 'cart-item-unit-select-<pid>-option-<value>' (e.g. -option-kg). Sidebar nav uses groups: expand nav-group-toggle-penjualan then click nav-sales.
rca of the issue: No issues found. Implementation is consistent with spec and backend contract.
